# PHIL.010 ? Pyrrhonism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** pyrrhonism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Radical doubt; opposing arguments of equal strength; suspension of all beliefs; ataraxia through skepticism; appearance vs reality distinction

## Application
For every claim find equally strong counter-claim; suspend belief on disputed matters; seek tranquility through non-commitment; distinguish appearance from claimed reality

## Key Values
- Radical doubt
- Equipollence
- Non-assertion
- Tranquil suspension

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, pyrrhonism
